fixtureScenarios.name: balanced_extension_coverage
fixtureScenarios.intent: Support and resistance extension rows both exist and current audit thresholds report no extension coverage warnings.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: No synthetic continuation-map row is required when both sides already have adequate factual extension coverage.

fixtureScenarios.name: no_resistance_extension_coverage
fixtureScenarios.intent: Support extension rows exist while resistance extension rows are absent.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: The audit runner reports coverage status and does not fabricate resistance extension rows.

fixtureScenarios.name: limited_downside_extension_coverage
fixtureScenarios.intent: A support extension exists but remains inside the configured downside coverage threshold.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Selected extension rows remain factual historical-candidate context.

fixtureScenarios.name: synthetic_continuation_map_preservation
fixtureScenarios.intent: Synthetic rows remain marked as forward-planning context and separate from historical enrichment gaps.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Synthetic rows are not treated as historical support/resistance evidence.

fixtureScenarios.name: spacing_guard
fixtureScenarios.intent: Closely spaced extension candidates do not all need to surface under current selection behavior.
fixtureScenarios.currentBehaviorLocked: Spacing diagnostics explain skipped candidates without tuning selection behavior.
